title: Respect guests and staff
description: Please treat other guests, visitors, and team members with respect. Aggressive, unsafe, or disruptive behavior may lead to refusal of service.

title: Keep shared spaces clean
description: Please keep tables, bathrooms, terrace seating, and shared areas clean. If something spills or breaks, let our team know as soon as possible.

title: Smoking only in designated areas
description: Smoking and vaping are allowed only in designated areas, if available. Please follow local regulations and staff instructions.

title: Children must be supervised
description: Children are welcome, but they should be supervised by an adult at all times, especially near stairs, terraces, parking areas, and hot food or drinks.

title: Pets by prior approval
description: Pets may be allowed depending on the area, season, and house policy. Please confirm with our team before visiting with a pet.

title: Reservations may have a grace period
description: Reserved tables may be held for a limited time after the scheduled arrival. If you are running late, please contact us.

title: Outside food and drinks need approval
description: Outside food, drinks, cakes, or alcohol may require prior approval. Some gatherings may include a service fee.

title: Tell us about allergies before ordering
description: Please inform our team about allergies, intolerances, or dietary restrictions before ordering. We will advise you on suitable options where possible.

title: Menu items depend on availability
description: Some coffee drinks, pastries, desserts, or seasonal offers may be limited or unavailable depending on supply, preparation time, and current workload.

title: Check takeaway orders before leaving
description: Please check takeaway coffee, pastry boxes, and packaged items before leaving so our team can correct anything immediately.

title: Small gathering details should be confirmed in advance
description: For birthdays, tastings, and group cafe visits, please confirm guest count, timing, and special requests in advance.
